title: pilosella verruculata subsp. akinfiewii
intro: Pilosella verruculata subsp. akinfiewii is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is commonly known as a type of dandelion. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella verruculata subsp. akinfiewii include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
